text: A street scene in a densely populated urban area, likely South America. Two people are walking on the sidewalk: a man in a plaid shirt and light pants carrying a yellow bag, and a woman in a dark blue dress. A large tree stands in the center, partially obscuring a small, makeshift structure with a corrugated roof. A blue metal fence runs along the sidewalk. Buildings line the street, and a banner reading 'NOVO' is visible on the right.
